pain.headline: We are inundated with a flood of information.
pain.body: I give you a foundation of digital clarity.
pain.card1Desc: Your digital stage – individual, authentic, impactful.
pain.card2Desc: Clear processes, more focus, less chaos.
pain.card3Desc: Show yourself in your authentic light.
pain.quote: Shine in the light you wish to shine in – and share your passion with the world.

motto.sub: Let us transform your digital presence into a mirror of your soul's expression

about.line1: I help individuals and businesses showcase their true selves and their unique brand identities online.
about.line2: With my comapany, you can focus on what actually benefits You moving forward and what your customers love and appreciate about You.
about.line3: I keep you clear in the digital jungle. Together, we'll find the path that's right for You — tailored to Your needs.
about.fullBio1: My name is Nils Tenkotte – founder of the Flowstate Foundation. I live and breathe expression. I love making music, dancing the night away or taking photos in the great outdoors.
about.fullBio2: My mission: To pave the way for people who pursue their vision with just as much passion and drive, so they can share their unique passion with others.
about.fullBio3: I firmly believe that your digital presence should be as unique as you are. In this age of artificial intelligence, we need free spirits more than ever—people who, through their authentic expression and vision, create value that brings society closer together.
about.fullBio4:
I’d stake my life on it that I’ll give it my all. 
Everything!

services.card1Tagline: Let your clients feel your vision
services.card1Desc: I accompany you through the entire lifecycle from your idea to the first domain to your individual website that embodies your vision.
services.card2Desc:
Together, we’ll find the perfect workflow for you. 
Consistent processes and systems aren’t just important for your team—they’re essential for effective communication with your customers.
services.card3Tagline: Show yourself as authentically as you are
services.card3Desc: Understand how social media really works. Learn to position yourself clearly and stand out from the crowd – without pretending to be someone else. Reach the people who truly fit you, build trust instead of just reach. Clear content instead of aimless posting. Social media with strategy instead of chance.
